headline: Assessing Global Payments (GPN) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Earnings Outlook
summary: Why Global Payments Is Back on Investors’ Radar Global Payments (GPN) has drawn fresh attention after its recent share performance, with a roughly 8% gain over the past month contrasting with negative returns over the past year and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Global Payments. At a share price of US$77.57, Global Payments has recently seen an uptick in momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 7.8%. headline: Is Global Payments (GPN) Pricing Look Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Global Payments is attractively priced today, a key question is how its current share price compares with what the underlying business may be worth. The stock closed at US$78.29, with returns of 0.6% over 7 days, 16.5% over 30 days and 3.7% year to date. The 1 year and 5 year returns of 20.9% and 61.1% declines provide important context for longer term holders. Recent coverage has focused on Global Payments as a major player in payments technology and merchant...
